title: The Door Problem
creator: Liz England
description: A single fictional door is used to explain how designers, artists, programmers, writers, audio staff, testers, and producers contribute to a game.
useful: A concise explanation of why apparently small features cross many disciplines and dependencies.
audience: New developers and collaborators trying to understand who does what on a game team.
learning: See how one feature crosses many disciplines
Identify dependencies hidden inside simple design requests
Understand common responsibilities across a development team

manualLinkStatus.note: Liz England's canonical article opened successfully and its title and publication date matched the catalogue record.
